name: create_node
description: Create a Rubix node. Auto-resolves parentRef — pass a parent node name to search for it, or omit for root (device level).

parentName.description: Name of parent node to search for. Omit to place at device root.

parentId.description: Exact parent node ID. Takes priority over parentName if both provided.

tags.description: Comma-separated identity tags to add (e.g. 'site,building' or 'sensor,temp,point')

siteRef.description: Site ref node ID (for building/floor containers)
